channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RAMKY] Ramky Infrastructure Ltd Sells Stake in Subsidiary Visakha Pharmacity Limited for INR 165.24 Crores
item.description:
Ramky Infrastructure Ltd (RIL) has executed a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) for the sale of its 51% stake in Visakha Pharmacity Limited (VPCL) to Brij Gopal Construction Company Private Limited (BGCCPL). The transaction is not a related party transaction and is expected to be completed within 10 days from the execution of the SPA. The consolidated turnover for RIL and VPCL for the financial year 2024-25 was INR 4,093.29 million and INR 4,012.59 million respectively.

  • Ramky Infrastructure Ltd sells 51% stake in Visakha Pharmacity Limited
  • Transaction value is INR 165.24 Crores
  • Brij Gopal Construction Company Private Limited is the buyer
  • Not a related party transaction
  • Expected completion within 10 days from SPA execution

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAMKY INFRASTRUCTURE LTD. | Category: Sale

item.title: [ATHENAGLO] Athena Global Technologies Acquires Medleymed Healthcare Solutions, Disinvests in Medley Medical Solutions
item.description:
Athena Global Technologies Ltd. has announced the acquisition of 100% equity shareholding of Medleymed Healthcare Solutions Private Limited, making it a Wholly Owned Subsidiary (WOS). The company has also approved the disinvestment in Medley Medical Solutions Private Limited. The acquisition is a related party transaction, conducted at 'arm’s length' and in the ordinary course of business. The disinvestment is expected to be completed by 31.03.2026. The acquisition cost is Rs. 10,000 and Medleymed Healthcare Solutions has a turnover of approximately 44.18 Lakhs in FY-2025.

  • Athena Global Technologies acquires 100% equity shareholding of Medleymed Healthcare Solutions
  • Medleymed Healthcare Solutions becomes a Wholly Owned Subsidiary (WOS) of Athena Global Technologies
  • Athena Global Technologies approves disinvestment in Medley Medical Solutions
  • Transaction is a related party transaction conducted at 'arm’s length'
  • Disinvestment expected to be completed by 31.03.2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Athena Global Technologies Ltd-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [TVSSCS] TVS Supply Chain Solutions Receives Order from Madhya Pradesh Tax Authority for FY 2019-20
item.description:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions Limited has received an order from the Assistant Commissioner of State Tax, Madhya Pradesh, regarding an alleged short payment of outward liability for FY 2019-20. The order amounts to Rs. 57,88,108. The Company maintains that this tax demand will not have a material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities. They plan to file an appropriate response and appeal the order before the authorities within the prescribed timelines.

  • Order received from Assistant Commissioner of State Tax, Madhya Pradesh
  • Alleged short payment of outward liability for FY 2019-20
  • Order amounts to Rs. 57,88,108
  • Company to file response and appeal the order
  • No material impact expected on financials, operations, or other activities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TVS Supply Chain Solutions Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [STARHFL] Star Housing Finance Ltd Proposes Appointment of Two New Additional Directors
item.description:
Star Housing Finance Ltd announced the outcome of its Board meeting held on March 31, 2026, where the Board proposed the appointment of two new Additional Directors: Mr. Anil Sachidanand and Mr. Ashish Jain. The proposed appointments are subject to approval from statutory authorities, regulatory bodies, shareholders, and/or any other required approvals. The Board meeting started at 7:30 p.m. and concluded at 07:45 p.m.

  • Star Housing Finance Ltd proposed the appointment of Mr. Anil Sachidanand as an Additional Director (Non-executive)
  • Star Housing Finance Ltd proposed the appointment of Mr. Ashish Jain as an Additional Director (Non-executive)
  • Proposed appointments are subject to approval from statutory authorities, regulatory bodies, shareholders, and/or any other required approvals
  • The Board meeting was held on March 31, 2026, and started at 7:30 p.m., concluding at 07:45 p.m.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Star Housing Finance Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INFY*] Infosys Ltd. Expects ₹1,745 Crore Refund Following Assessment Orders
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Infosys Limited has received assessment orders under Section 250 and Section 254 of the Income-tax Act, 1961 from the Income-tax Department, Government of India. The orders were received for Assessment Years 2018-19, 2017-18, 2013-14, 2019-20, 2020-21, and 2021-22. The Company expects a cumulative refund of ₹1,745 crore (including interest). The Company is currently evaluating the impact of these orders on its financial statements for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Infosys Ltd. has received assessment orders from the Income-tax Department, Government of India
  • The orders are for Assessment Years 2018-19, 2017-18, 2013-14, 2019-20, 2020-21, and 2021-22
  • Infosys Ltd. expects a cumulative refund of ₹1,745 crore (including interest)
  • The Company is currently evaluating the impact of these orders on its financial statements for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INFOSYS LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [EIDPARRY] EID Parry India Ltd to Close Refinery Unit of Wholly Owned Subsidiary, M/s. Parry Sugars Refinery India Private Limited
item.description:
EID Parry India Ltd has announced the closure of the refinery unit of its wholly owned subsidiary, M/s. Parry Sugars Refinery India Private Limited (PSRIPL), due to structural shifts that eroded the fundamentals of the business model. The refinery, established in 2006, was built on importing raw sugar, refining it into white sugar, and exporting the refined sugar to global markets. However, non-availability of natural gas, sharp decline in white premiums, shutdowns, demurrage charges, inventory write-off, hedge losses, and high finance cost have resulted in significant increase in accumulated losses. The accumulated losses as of March 31, 2025, were around Rs. 1,406 Crores. The Company will need to create a provision of approximately Rs. 655 crores and impair the current carrying value of its investment in PSRIPL, amounting to Rs. 46 crores. The detailed disclosure is enclosed as Annexure I.

  • Closure of refinery unit of wholly owned subsidiary, M/s. Parry Sugars Refinery India Private Limited
  • Structural shifts eroded the fundamentals of the business model
  • Accumulated losses as of March 31, 2025, were around Rs. 1,406 Crores
  • Company will need to create a provision of approximately Rs. 655 crores
  • Company will need to impair the current carrying value of its investment in PSRIPL, amounting to Rs. 46 crores

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: E.I.D.-PARRY (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Closure of Operations

item.title: [ARTSONEN] Artson Ltd converts payables into long-term loan worth Rs. 9.59 crores from Tata Projects Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

On 31st March 2026, Artson Ltd (formerly Artson Engineering Limited) announced that it has entered into an agreement with Tata Projects Limited (TPL) for the conversion of payables (to TPL) into a long-term loan amounting to Rs. 9,58,68,023 (Rupees Nine Crore Fifty-Eight Lakhs Sixty-Eight Thousand and Twenty-Three Only). This move is aimed at strengthening Artson's financial position.

  • Artson Ltd converts payables into a long-term loan from Tata Projects Limited
  • The total loan amount is Rs. 9,58,68,023 (Rupees Nine Crore Fifty-Eight Lakhs Sixty-Eight Thousand and Twenty-Three Only)
  • This agreement is a strategic financial decision to improve Artson's financial stability
  • The agreement was signed on 31st March 2026
  • Deepak Tibrewal, Company Secretary & Compliance Officer (FCS 8925) of Artson Ltd, has confirmed the agreement

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ARTSON ENGINEERING LTD. | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [NAZARA] Nazara Technologies Announces Trading Window Closure for Connected Persons till April 2026
item.description:
Nazara Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange about the closure of the Trading Window for all Connected/Designated Persons and their immediate relatives, as per the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration and declaration of the results is yet to be intimated.

  • Nazara Technologies Limited announces Trading Window closure for Connected/Designated Persons and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure will be in effect from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026.
  • The decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration and declaration of the results is yet to be intimated.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nazara Technologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [EIDPARRY] EID Parry India Ltd to Close Refinery Unit of Wholly Owned Subsidiary, M/s. Parry Sugars Refinery India Private Limited
item.description:
EID Parry India Ltd has announced the closure of operations of the refinery unit of its wholly owned subsidiary, M/s. Parry Sugars Refinery India Private Limited ('PSRIPL'), with effect from the close of working hours on March 31, 2026. The decision comes after several structural shifts that materially eroded the fundamentals on which the business model was built, resulting in significant increase in accumulated losses. The total estimated liabilities of PSRIPL amount to Rs. 998 crores, which includes bank borrowings of Rs. 877 crores. The Company will need to create a provision of approximately Rs. 655 crores and impair the current carrying value of its investment in PSRIPL, amounting to Rs. 46 crores. The Company has adequate funds as of date to meet these requirements.

  • EID Parry India Ltd to close the refinery unit of its wholly owned subsidiary, M/s. Parry Sugars Refinery India Private Limited
  • The decision comes after several structural shifts that materially eroded the fundamentals of the business model
  • The accumulated losses of PSRIPL as of March 31, 2025, were around Rs. 1,406 Crores
  • The Company will need to create a provision of approximately Rs. 655 crores and impair the current carrying value of its investment in PSRIPL, amounting to Rs. 46 crores
  • EID Parry India Ltd has adequate funds as of date to meet these requirements

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: E.I.D.-PARRY (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Closure of Operations

item.title: [APLLTD] Alembic Pharmaceuticals' Head - Formulation Business Development Resigns
item.description:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals Ltd. has announced the resignation of Mr. Nilesh Wadhwa, Head - Formulation Business Development. The resignation is effective from 31st March, 2026 (after closure of business hours). The company has disclosed the details as required under the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Mr. Nilesh Wadhwa has resigned from his position as Head - Formulation Business Development at Alembic Pharmaceuticals Ltd.
  • His resignation is effective from 31st March, 2026 (after closure of business hours).
  • The company has disclosed the details as required under the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • Mr. Wadhwa's resignation is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • The company has attached the intimation of resignation and the details required under the SEBI regulations as 'Annexure-B' and 'Annexure-A' respectively.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ALEMBIC PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: Management Change
